recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: Freedom Writers
recommendations.overview: A young teacher inspires her class of at-risk students to learn tolerance, apply themselves, and pursue education beyond high school.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Once in a Lifetime
recommendations.overview: At Léon Blum High School in Créteil, France, a history teacher decides to have her weakest 10th grade class participate in a national history competition.

recommendations.title: The Death of Stalin
recommendations.overview: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, the question remains — just who is running the government?

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: The Last Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, a humble Judean carpenter beginning to see that he is the son of God, is drawn into revolutionary action against the Roman occupiers by Judas -- despite his protestations that love, not violence, is the path to salvation. The burden of being t

recommendations.title: Dismissed
recommendations.overview: A straight-edged teacher finds trouble when an honors student is willing to do anything to get an A.
